selection_rationale.title: Survey of transcriptome analyses of hippocampal neurogenesis with focus on adult dentate gyrus stem cells
selection_rationale.reason: HIGH relevance — directly describes sequential marker progression (type-2a/2b/3 → stage-5 → stage-6); already traversed at depth 0 as a source paper. Not eligible for re-selection.

selection_rationale.title: Tis21 Expression Marks Not Only Populations of Neurogenic Precursor Cells but Also New Postmitotic Neurons in Adult Hippocampal Neurogenesis
selection_rationale.reason: HIGH relevance — directly characterizes Tis21/DCX/NeuN/Calbindin co-expression in adult DG; already traversed at depth 0. Not eligible for re-selection.

selection_rationale.title: Intermediate Progenitors in Adult Hippocampal Neurogenesis: Tbr2 Expression and Coordinate Regulation of Neuronal Output
selection_rationale.reason: HIGH relevance — Tbr2 marker characterization for type-2a/2b progenitors directly fills dg_neuroblast subtype heterogeneity gap; already traversed at depth 0. Not eligible for re-selection.

selection_rationale.title: Neurogenesis in neurodegenerative diseases in the adult human brain
selection_rationale.reason: HIGH relevance — confirms DCX+/Ki67+ neuroblast and DCX+/PSA-NCAM+/NeuN+ immature neuron marker panels; already traversed at depth 0. Not eligible for re-selection.

selection_rationale.title: Adult neurogenesis: a real hope or a delusion?
selection_rationale.reason: HIGH relevance — addresses electrophysiological maturation (synaptic integration, intrinsic electrical characteristics) directly relevant to ephys GAPs; already traversed at depth 0. Not eligible for re-selection.

selection_rationale.title: Evidence that Doublecortin Is Dispensable for the Development of Adult Born Neurons in Mice
selection_rationale.reason: HIGH relevance — establishes DCX as canonical immature neuron marker, confirms calretinin (immature) to NeuN (mature) transition; already traversed at depth 0. Not eligible for re-selection.

selection_rationale.title: Advances toward regenerative medicine in the central nervous system: challenges in making stem cell therapy a viable clinical strategy
selection_rationale.reason: HIGH relevance — contains direct statement on immature neuron high excitability and network dynamics (partial ephys characterization); already traversed at depth 0. Not eligible for re-selection.

selection_rationale.title: PSA Depletion Induces the Differentiation of Immature Neurons in the Piriform Cortex of Adult Mice
selection_rationale.reason: MODERATE relevance — AIS/action potential firing data for immature neurons; piriform cortex not DG; already traversed at depth 0. Not eligible for re-selection.

selection_rationale.title: Cellular Plasticity in the Adult Murine Piriform Cortex: Continuous Maturation of Dormant Precursors Into Excitatory Neurons
selection_rationale.reason: MODERATE relevance — glutamatergic differentiation trajectory and spine density data useful for dg_mature_granule_neuron context; piriform cortex not DG; already traversed at depth 0. Not eligible for re-selection.

selection_rationale.title: Widespread Doublecortin Expression in the Cerebral Cortex of the Octodon degus
selection_rationale.reason: MODERATE relevance — confirms DCX+/NeuN− neuroblast negative marker profile and proliferative status; cross-species (Octodon degus); already traversed at depth 0. Not eligible for re-selection.

selection_rationale.title: New GABAergic interneurons in the adult neocortex and striatum are generated from different precursors
selection_rationale.reason: MODERATE relevance — calretinin-to-calbindin developmental switch in DG granule neurons described; already traversed at depth 0. Not eligible for re-selection.

selection_rationale.title: Postnatal and Adult Neurogenesis in Mammals, Including Marsupials
selection_rationale.reason: MODERATE relevance — confirms glutamatergic identity and SGZ-to-GCL migration; general review without stage-specific marker or ephys detail; already traversed at depth 0. Not eligible for re-selection.

selection_rationale.title: Mimicking Neural Stem Cell Niche by Biocompatible Substrates
selection_rationale.reason: MODERATE relevance — standard DG neurogenesis stage description with morphology timeline; biomaterials focus; already traversed at depth 0. Not eligible for re-selection.

selection_rationale.title: Prenatal genesis of layer II doublecortin expressing neurons in neonatal and young adult guinea pig cerebral cortex
selection_rationale.reason: LOW relevance — focuses on neocortical DCX+ neurons in guinea pig; DG mention incidental; no original DG electrophysiology data; already traversed at depth 0. Not eligible for re-selection.

selection_rationale.title: Commentary: Posttraining ablation of adult-generated olfactory granule cells degrades odor-reward memories
selection_rationale.reason: LOW relevance — olfactory bulb GABAergic granule cells, not DG glutamatergic granule cells; already traversed at depth 0. Not eligible for re-selection.

selection_rationale.title: Protective Effect of Antioxidants on Neuronal Dysfunction and Plasticity in Huntington's Disease
selection_rationale.reason: LOW relevance — Huntington's disease review; DG neurogenesis description is generic background with no marker or ephys specifics; already traversed at depth 0. Not eligible for re-selection.

selection_rationale.title: Ameliorating effect of postweaning exposure to antioxidant on disruption of hippocampal neurogenesis induced by developmental hypothyroidism in rats.
selection_rationale.reason: LOW relevance — no PMC fulltext available; antioxidant/hypothyroidism focus; tangential to node context; already in depth-0 queried set. Not eligible for re-selection.

notes: candidate_refs array was empty in depth_0_candidate_refs.json — ASTA citation graph traversal did not run (ConnectionRefusedError), and the EuropePMC fallback fetched fulltext only (no outbound citation IDs were harvested). All 22 depth-0 papers appear only as gap_papers/queried_ids with no outbound candidate references extracted. Priority papers named in summaries (Esposito et al. 2005, Ge et al. 2006, Klempin 2011) were cited within fetched fulltext but not captured as CorpusId entries in candidate_refs. Depth-1 traversal requires either (a) re-running with ASTA citation graph endpoint available, or (b) manually supplying CorpusIds for the named priority targets.
